# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# vpc-network.yaml
resources:
  - name: three-tier-vpc-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      routingConfig:
        routingMode: REGIONAL
      description: "VPC network for three-tier application with auto-created subnets"

  - name: deny-all-ingress-firewall
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 65534
      direction: INGRESS
      denied:
        - IPProtocol: all
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      description: "Default deny all ingress traffic - explicit deny rule"

  - name: deny-all-egress-firewall
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 65534
      direction: EGRESS
      denied:
        - IPProtocol: all
      destinationRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      description: "Default deny all egress traffic - explicit deny rule"

  - name: allow-internal-firewall
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 65000
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "443"
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "22"
      sourceRanges:
        - 10.128.0.0/9
      targetTags:
        - three-tier-internal
      description: "Allow internal communication on secure ports only"

  - name: allow-web-tier-https
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "443"
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      targetTags:
        - web-tier
      description: "Allow HTTPS to web tier only"

  - name: allow-app-tier-from-web
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1100
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "8443"
      sourceTags:
        - web-tier
      targetTags:
        - app-tier
      description: "Allow secure communication from web tier to app tier"

  - name: allow-db-tier-from-app
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1200
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "5432"
            - "3306"
      sourceTags:
        - app-tier
      targetTags:
        - db-tier
      description: "Allow database connections from app tier only"

  - name: allow-health-checks
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
      sourceRanges:
        - 35.191.0.0/16
        - 130.211.0.0/22
      targetTags:
        - web-tier
        - app-tier
      description: "Allow Google Cloud health checks"

  - name: allow-iap-ssh
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: INGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "22"
      sourceRanges:
        - 35.235.240.0/20
      description: "Allow SSH via Identity-Aware Proxy only"

  - name: allow-secure-egress
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      priority: 1000
      direction: EGRESS
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "443"
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "53"
        - IPProtocol: udp
          ports:
            - "53"
      destinationRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      description: "Allow HTTPS and DNS egress only"

  - name: cloud-router
    type: compute.v1.router
    properties:
      network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
      region: us-central1
      description: "Cloud Router for NAT gateway"

  - name: cloud-nat
    type: compute.v1.router.nat
    properties:
      router: $(ref.cloud-router.name)
      region: us-central1
      natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
      sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: ALL_SUBNETWORKS_ALL_IP_RANGES
      logConfig:
        enable: true
        filter: ALL
      minPortsPerVm: 64
      maxPortsPerVm: 512

outputs:
  - name: networkName
    value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.name)
  - name: networkSelfLink
    value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
